	age = age_1_traditions
	potential = {
		always = no # M8 disables vanilla advancement
		has_or_had_tag = BRI
	}
	global_fish_output_modifier = 0.1
	global_sailors_modifier = 0.1
	
	requires = feudalism_advance
}

	age = age_2_renaissance
	potential = {
